evidence_details.caveat: mRNA expression levels may not reflect protein activity. TARDBP in particular: mRNA UP in AD may reflect nuclear depletion compensation (cytoplasmic aggregation), not increased splicing activity. All causal claims require functional validation.

m8_regulatory_context.summary: The ABITRAM isoform switch may reflect transcriptional changes. Top regulators: none. Evidence strength: weak.

m9_promoter_usage.summary: ABITRAM: CT and AD isoforms share the same promoter region (TSS_diff=43 bp, same_promoter). Mechanism classification unchanged from M14.

m10_apa.summary: ABITRAM: CT and AD isoforms differ in 3' end by 4,879 bp (moderate_apa). AD isoform gains: ARE_destabilizing. AD isoform loses: PAS_sites, miR-132_seed, miR-34a_seed. Predicted mRNA stability effect: AD_escapes_miR-132_repression. APA evidence strength: correlative. Caution: 3'UTR changes require RIP-seq or poly-A-seq validation for functional confirmation.

m12_ppi.interpretation: None of the hypothesized partners ([]) found with sufficient STRING evidence. PPI claim requires experimental validation (co-IP / proximity-ligation).
